name: music-kb
description: Local SQLite music-analysis search for agents, with a publisher CLI and read-only MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Search a local, read-only Music Flamingo analysis library.
interface.longDescription: A local-first SQLite knowledge base: publishers create verified snapshots; agents query a read-only local copy through MCP.
defaultPrompt: Find tracks with a specific rare production tag.
Compare canonical music analyses through granular retrieval tags.
Check whether my local music knowledge-base snapshot is current.
